context: Tests whether the agent uses the correct WooCommerce Subscriptions classes, meta keys, and lifecycle action hooks when building a subscription product plugin. Covers programmatic product creation with correct meta, lifecycle hook registration, and failed payment dunning logic.

checklist.name: WC_Product_Subscription class
checklist.description: Uses WC_Product_Subscription (not WC_Product or another product class) to instantiate the subscription product

checklist.name: Subscription price meta
checklist.description: Sets _subscription_price meta via update_post_meta (not only set_regular_price)

checklist.name: Subscription length meta
checklist.description: Sets _subscription_length meta via update_post_meta (0 for forever)

checklist.name: Trial meta keys
checklist.description: Sets both _subscription_trial_length AND _subscription_trial_period meta via update_post_meta

checklist.name: Activation hook
checklist.description: Uses woocommerce_subscription_status_active action hook to handle new subscription activation

checklist.name: Renewal success hook
checklist.description: Uses woocommerce_subscription_renewal_payment_complete action hook to handle successful renewals

checklist.name: Payment failed hook
checklist.description: Uses woocommerce_subscription_payment_failed action hook to handle renewal failures

checklist.name: Cancellation hook
checklist.description: Uses woocommerce_subscription_status_cancelled action hook to handle cancellations

checklist.name: Failure count check
checklist.description: Calls get_failed_payment_count() on the subscription to determine number of failures before taking additional action

checklist.name: On-hold on repeated failure
checklist.description: Calls WC_Subscriptions_Manager::put_subscription_on_hold_for_user() when failure count reaches 2 or more
